scope: Claude Managed Agents self-hosted worker execution and private MCP tunnel governance

requires: preflight fails closed for unsafe worker configuration
denied tool effects do not dispatch
filesystem paths are constrained to declared worker roots
egress changes are constrained to sandbox grants
memory writes are denied and receipted
MCP tunnel routes through HELM MCP Gateway
OAuth resource and required scopes recorded
tunnel domain hash and CA certificate reference hash recorded
raw upstream MCP tunnel bypass is denied

live_evidence.promotion_guard: helm-ai-kernel conform managed-agents claude-self-hosted --provider daytona --live-config <file> --out artifacts/claude-managed-agents-live --sign --promote-registry
live_evidence.claim_limit: Provider-verified status requires a real live Anthropic self-hosted worker and HELM MCP Gateway evidence pack. Anthropic MCP tunnels remain research-preview.

commands: helm-ai-kernel conform managed-agents claude-self-hosted --provider daytona --live-config <file> --out artifacts/claude-managed-agents-live --sign
